name: Buckwheat Pasta with Vegetables

ingredients.item: bunch cavolo nero (black cabbage), stems discarded, leaves roughly chopped
potatoes, boiled in their skins then diced into 2–3 cm cubes
young green beans, cut into 2 cm pieces
grated Gruyère sea salt and ground black pepper

method: Mix the pasta ingredients into a dough; if it seems dry, add a few drops of water. Divide the dough into 3 or 4 pieces. Pass 1 piece through your pasta machine on a wide setting, then fold it up in order to pass it through again. Continue doing so until the dough is of a uniform consistency and shiny. Repeat with the other pieces of dough. Set the pasta machine to a medium setting and put the pieces through again to make large, thin sheets.
